## Checklist
- [ ] Edited the **source** (`harness/`, `.claude/skills`, `.claude/agents`, `AGENTS.md`) — not a generated adapter (`CLAUDE.md`, `.cursor/`, `.windsurf/`, `GEMINI.md`).
- [ ] Ran `node scripts/test.mjs` and `node scripts/doctor.mjs` — both green.
- [ ] If skills / agents / conventions changed: re-ran `node scripts/build-plugin.mjs` and `node scripts/build-create.mjs` and committed the result.
- [ ] Artifacts are in **English**; commit follows **Conventional Commits**.
- [ ] DCO sign-off (`git commit -s`).
